comment: AI-OS v2 MCP Server Registry. All servers must be listed here before they can be used with WRITE or EXECUTE permissions.

gemini._note: E-45: gemini-2.x series shuts down 2026-06-01. The Interactions API switched the request payload key from 'outputs' to 'steps' on 2026-05-20. bin/ai writes default_model into .gemini/settings.json on init/sync; user values are preserved. Override via env GEMINI_MODEL or by editing .gemini/settings.json after sync.
gemini._rollback: Per may-2026-upgrades.md §Rollback Plan: set GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.5-pro (while still available) if 3.1-pro shows prompt drift.

task-synchronizer-mcp._note: Exclusive State Mutator (P-39): manages .ai/state.json, regenerates TASKS.md and REVIEWS.md as views
task-synchronizer-mcp._mandate: v3.1 (P-44): state.json is the exclusive write target. TASKS.md and REVIEWS.md are generated views only. Write tools reject calls when state.json is absent — run: ai migrate-state to seed it.

safe-exec-mcp._note: disable-model-invocation: true — Claude cannot self-authorize execution bypass

risk-analyzer-mcp._note: TSRT classifier — invoked automatically by ai update and ai review

context-invoker-mcp._note: Dynamic skill/agent loader — call activate_skill or activate_agent by name to inject instructions into context

archive-manager-mcp._note: Auto-Pilot Archive (P-27): monitors .ai/ context health and triggers archive when thresholds are exceeded

orchestrator-mcp._note: Deterministic workflow execution (P-38): replaces LLM-interpreted skills with programmatic orchestration. run_dispatch (E-92) is a read-only DAG dispatch planner — listed so mcp-router proxy_call can reach it.

memory-manager-mcp._note: §31 Cross-Project Memory Palace: stores high-level project signatures in ~/.ai-os/memory/signatures.json

verification-mcp._note: §32 Verification Audit: checks agent YAML frontmatter allowed-tools against registry; flags Ghost Tools as CRITICAL

lsp-mcp._note: §23 Code Intelligence Layer: TypeScript compiler API — symbol/type awareness for Tier 3 refactors

patch-mcp._note: §25 Staleness-Aware Patching: MD5-verified atomic writes — prevents race-condition overwrites

token-budget-mcp._note: §27 Token Budget & Cost Governance: real-time LLM spend tracking persisted in ~/.ai-os/usage.sqlite

propose-patch-mcp._note: §30 Human-in-the-Loop Safe Diff Flow: propose_patch requires explicit confirm_patch before writing to disk

github-bridge-mcp._note: §28 GitHub Bridge: fetches assigned issues via gh CLI and seeds state.json for autonomous Architect cycles

approval-mcp._note: E-10 HITL Gate: blocks Tier 3 ops until human types y/Y in terminal. Audit trail in ~/.ai-os/approvals.sqlite. Cannot be bypassed. Blueprint: interop.md §2. SEC_CLEARED 2026-04-24.
approval-mcp._security: T-HITL-001: ANSI stripped. T-HITL-002: DB_PATH hardcoded. T-HITL-003: stdin.isTTY required. T-HITL-004: SQLite write before response. T-HITL-005: maxLength 200/500 enforced.

advisor-mcp._note: E-9 A2A Bridge: Claude queries Gemini Architect mid-execution via `gemini -p`. Read-only — Gemini cannot write files. All rulings logged as [A2A_RULING] in .ai/LOG.md. Blueprint: interop.md §1.

computer-use-mcp._note: E-8 Native Computer Use: sandboxed OS-level screen/keyboard/mouse for TestSprite visual QA. Linux: Xvfb DISPLAY=:99. macOS: host display with warning. Decision D-002.
computer-use-mcp._security: SEC_CLEARED E-8 2026-04-21 — DISPLAY hardcoded to :99, HOME=/tmp/computer-use-sandbox, keyboard input sanitized, no persistent screenshots. See .ai/SECURITY.md T-CU-001..T-CU-005. E-38: env block carried in registry so `ai sync` cannot regress the sandbox.

cache-manager-mcp._note: E-11 Explicit Context Cache: assembles .ai/blueprints/*.md, architect.md, state.sqlite schema, and registry.json into a prompt-cacheable System Context blob. mtime-based invalidation. Cache in ~/.ai-os/cache.sqlite. Blueprint: caching.md.

mcp-router._note: E-40 MCP Router/Proxy: progressive tool discovery — list_domains/activate_domain expose only the active category's servers; proxy_call forwards JSON-RPC over stdio. Mitigates 23-server schema bloat. Blueprint: mcp-router.md.
mcp-router._security: RBAC mirror — proxy_call rejects targets outside the active domain or absent from registry allowed-tools. Targets spawned with explicit env allowlist (PATH, HOME) plus registry-declared env block (e.g. computer-use-mcp DISPLAY/HOME). No shell, no eval. Cannot bypass project .claude/settings.json permissions.

code-execution-mcp._note: E-39 Sandboxed Code Execution: ephemeral Docker REPL for Python (python:3.12-slim) and Node (node:22-alpine). Fail-closed [SANDBOX_UNAVAILABLE] when Docker daemon is missing. Blueprint: code-execution.md.
code-execution-mcp._security: Network=none, --read-only root FS, no volume mounts, --memory=512m --cpus=0.5 --pids-limit=64, --user=65534:65534 (nobody), --cap-drop=ALL, --security-opt=no-new-privileges, tmpfs /tmp size-capped (64m, noexec). Wall-clock timeout enforced by parent (SIGKILL on overrun). stdout/stderr capped at 4096 chars. Code length capped at 16384 chars. Language whitelist {python, typescript}. No bare-metal fallback — sandbox is the only execution path.
